summary: Tested Inventory module Sprint 1 features: Suppliers CRUD APIs and frontend. Backend API tests all passed (17/17). Frontend UI testing faced authentication session persistence issues with Playwright - 403 errors when navigating directly to /inventory/suppliers.

integration_issues.issue: API returns 403 when navigating directly - likely auth token not persisting. Playwright test shows login form not being properly filled/submitted.

Suppliers_Frontend_UI.details: Playwright navigation to /inventory/suppliers resulted in 403 - auth session not persisting properly in test environment

QuickAddProductModal_item_type.details: showItemType, itemTypeOptions props added. DEFAULT_INVENTORY_TYPES = [Product, Raw Material]. Modal correctly switches between RetailPro types (Product/Service) and Inventory types (Product/Raw Material)

action_items: Frontend UI: Manual verification needed for /inventory/suppliers page after proper login through the main app
Verify QuickAddProductModal showItemType functionality in the Inventory module context
critical_code_review_comments: Backend Suppliers CRUD is fully functional with proper validation and error handling
Supplier name uniqueness enforced correctly (case-insensitive check)
Delete supplier correctly unlinks items before deletion
QuickAddProductModal correctly implements item_type field with appType-based options

success_rate.frontend: Not fully tested - auth session issues in Playwright

seed_data_creation: Test suppliers created and cleaned up during pytest execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend Suppliers CRUD API (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/inventory/suppliers) fully tested with pytest - all 17 tests pass. Frontend /inventory/suppliers page exists but Playwright testing faced session persistence issues. Manual verification recommended. QuickAddProductModal updated with showItemType prop - code verified. Business does not have 'inventory' in linked_apps but require_inventory_module has backward compatibility fallback.
